inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description: Defines the accessible ARIA name of the component.

inputs.name: accessibleNameRef
inputs.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the component.

inputs.name: alternateRowColors
inputs.description: Determines whether the table rows are displayed with alternating background colors.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description:
Defines if the loading indicator should be shown.

*Note:** When the component is loading, it is not interactive.

inputs.name: loadingDelay
inputs.description: Defines the delay in milliseconds, after which the loading indicator will show up for this component.

inputs.name: noDataText
inputs.description: Defines the text to be displayed when there are no rows in the component.

inputs.name: overflowMode
inputs.description: Defines the mode of the ui5-table overflow behavior. Available options are: Scroll - Columns are shown as regular columns and horizontal scrolling is enabled. Popin - Columns are shown as pop-ins instead of regular columns.

inputs.name: rowActionCount
inputs.description:
Defines the maximum number of row actions that is displayed, which determines the width of the row action column.

*Note:** It is recommended to use a maximum of 3 row actions, as exceeding this limit may take up too much space on smaller screens.

outputs.name: ui5Move
outputs.description:
Fired when a movable list item is dropped onto a drop target.

*Notes:**

The `move` event is fired only if there was a preceding `move-over` with prevented default action.

If the dragging operation is a cross-browser operation or files are moved to a potential drop target,
the `source` parameter will be `null`.

outputs.name: ui5MoveOver
outputs.description:
Fired when a movable item is moved over a potential drop target during a dragging operation.

If the new position is valid, prevent the default action of the event using `preventDefault()`.

*Note:** If the dragging operation is a cross-browser operation or files are moved to a potential drop target,
the `source` parameter will be `null`.

outputs.name: ui5RowActionClick
outputs.description: Fired when a row action is clicked.

outputs.name: ui5RowClick
outputs.description:
Fired when an interactive row is clicked.

*Note:** This event is not fired if the `behavior` property of the selection component is set to `RowOnly`.
In that case, use the `change` event of the selection component instead.
